notes: Provider VLESS scan uses no-mux probe validation to avoid false bad results from XRay mux crashes on Keenetic MIPS builds
Scan preflight now tolerates known XRay run-test segmentation faults and validates by live SOCKS start where possible
Scan results now expose note, ip, youtube and latency details in the profiles API and simple/expert UI
Scan cancel now stops lingering scan/probe processes and resets scan progress counters
Fast simple UI, Hysteria2 support and safe server switching behavior are preserved
